title: Research data supporting: "Exploring RNA destabilization mechanisms in biomolecular condensates through atomistic Simulations"
author: Boccalini, Matteo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the data to reproduce the results shown in the bioRxiv preprint "Exploring RNA Destabilization Mechanisms in Biomolecular Condensates through Atomistic Simulations" (DOI: 10.1101/2024.09.13.612876).
steps_raw: This repository contains the data to reproduce the results shown in the bioRxiv preprint "Exploring RNA Destabilization Mechanisms in Biomolecular Condensates through Atomistic Simulations" (DOI: 10.1101/2024.09.13.612876).
